package rulefixtures

import (
	yaml "gopkg.in/yaml.v2"
)

// scenario for yaml_unmarshal_untrusted_input: `yaml.Unmarshal(untrustedInput, &target)` using `gopkg.in/yaml.v2` without size limits
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario750Positive(untrustedInput []byte, target any) error {
	return yaml.Unmarshal(untrustedInput, target)
}
